repair_candidate.summary: Repair/finalization plan for focused contributor PRs in inventory shard 14. No replacement PR should be opened yet; first repair maintainer-modifiable contributor branches and complete merge preflight. Exclude #84140 from automated repair until a maintainer decides whether the broad formatting PR is wanted.

repair_candidate.pr_body: Clownfish plan for live-pr-inventory-20260617T073528-014. Repair maintainer-modifiable contributor branches before considering replacement PRs. Complete current mergeability checks, Codex /review, review-bot hydration, and narrow validation for #81572, #84028, #84156, and #84288. Preserve source PR credit in any repair or replacement path. #84140 is intentionally excluded pending maintainer decision because it is broad, refactor-only, and labeled dirty-candidate.
